transcript.content: 每次功能改完测试完，自动提交github 每次改完测试完自动部署到本地openclaw ，需要重启openclaw的话，那就自动重启下（可以通过openclaw gateway restart 来重启） 不要硬编码； 有新功能后要及时更新文档，文档要简洁明了，方便后续维护和使用； 测试要覆盖到新功能，测试用例要清晰明了，方便后续维护和使用； 如果context大小超过50%，给个提醒，建议删除过时的内容，保持简洁明了； 如果需要我来测试的话，大字体告诉我要怎么做，需要简明扼要； 目标： 在新的 Codex 线程里重做体感测试，确认 Context Minor GC 现在是否更薄、更稳、切题后更明显收缩。 已完成： - 已修复 timeout 伪装成 continue 的问题；现在 timeout 会明确显示 decision_timeout。 - 已修复 [GC-*] 手工测试被 assistant 指挥话术污染的问题；现在会按 case 前缀只抽同 case 消息。 - 已修复 small working set 被 summary-first 膨胀的问题；raw keep 更轻时会退回 raw context。 - 已把 codex-minor-gc-current-editor-update-after-detour 和 codex-minor-gc-zh-dense-multitopic-return 收进固定回归。 - 最新 codex live eval 已全绿：cases=6, minor-gc passed=6, false activations=0, missed activations=0。 进行中： - 现在要做的是“新线程真实体感测试”，不是继续改代码。 - 需要你直接引导我做最短的 2 组手工 case，并在每组结束后读 gc 指标。 涉及文件： - /Users/redcreen/Project/unified-memory-core/src/structured-decision-runner.js - /Users/redcree...

记忆已恢复，当前我会按“只做新线程体感测试，不改代码”的约束继续。 关键信息我已经对齐： - 当前目标是新 Codex 线程里做 2 组最短手工 case，验证 Context Minor GC 是否更薄、更稳、切题后更明显收缩。 - 顺序固定：先跑“中文多轮切题 case”，再跑“旧值被新值覆盖后再回问”的 case。 - 每组结束后都要执行一次 `npm run codex:vscode:gc --silent`，重点看…
# 第 1 组测试：现在开始 请在**新的 Codex 线程**里，依次只发这 4 句：

decision.archive_summary: Preserve t1 as a compact semantic pin: user workflow rules and durable preferences include auto-commit after changes/tests, auto-deploy to local openclaw, restart via `openclaw gateway restart` if needed, avoid hardcoding, keep docs/tests updated and maintainable, warn when context exceeds 50%, and give large-font concise manual test instructions when user action is needed. Current active task from t1/t2 is not coding but running a new-thread manual feel test for Context Minor GC with 2 short cases and reading GC metrics after each case.
decision.reasoning_summary: The active topic is still the same manual GC feel test, so relation=continue. t2 already compresses the actionable test context from t1, and t5 contains the concrete next step, so raw t1 can leave the next-turn prompt if its durable instructions are pinned. t3 is a redundant start signal and is safe to evict. Keep the recent raw testing turns because the next turn still depends on the live test flow.

applied.archiveSummary: Preserve t1 as a compact semantic pin: user workflow rules and durable preferences include auto-commit after changes/tests, auto-deploy to local openclaw, restart via `openclaw gateway restart` if needed, avoid hardcoding, keep docs/tests updated and maintainable, warn when context exceeds 50%, and give large-font concise manual test instructions when user action is needed. Current active task from t1/t2 is not coding but running a new-thread manual feel test for Context Minor GC with 2 short cases and reading GC metrics after each case.
applied.reasoningSummary: The active topic is still the same manual GC feel test, so relation=continue. t2 already compresses the actionable test context from t1, and t5 contains the concrete next step, so raw t1 can leave the next-turn prompt if its durable instructions are pinned. t3 is a redundant start signal and is safe to evict. Keep the recent raw testing turns because the next turn still depends on the live test flow.
